title: The clock on my wall
summary: Describe the clock on your wall and what it reminds you of.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a clock on your wall. Describe what it looks like, where you got it, and what it reminds you of. Use present simple and simple adjectives.
hintStarters: On my wall, there is a clock that…
The clock is… and it has…
Every time I look at it, I think about…
sampleText: On the wall above my desk in my flat in Osaka, there is a round wooden clock. It is not very big — about thirty centimetres wide. The dial is white and the numbers are black. The hands are thin and dark brown. The clock makes a soft tick sound every second, but it is very quiet. I got this clock as a gift from my uncle when I moved into my first apartment. He bought it at a small market in the old part of the city. I really like how simple it looks. Every time I look at the clock, I think about my uncle. He lives far away now, so I do not see him often. The clock also reminds me of the first day I lived alone. That was an exciting and a little scary day for me. The clock runs on one small battery and I change it once a year. This old clock keeps good time. It is my favorite thing on the wall.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: khoảng ba mươi xen-ti-mét chiều rộng

sampleAnnotations.phrase: a soft tick sound every second
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: tiếng tích tắc nhẹ mỗi giây

sampleAnnotations.phrase: as a gift from my uncle
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: như một món quà từ chú tôi
chuyển vào căn hộ đầu tiên
trông đơn giản như thế nào

sampleAnnotations.phrase: reminds me of the first day I lived alone
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: nhắc tôi nhớ ngày đầu tiên sống một mình
thú vị và hơi đáng sợ

sampleAnnotations.phrase: my favorite thing on the wall
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: vật yêu thích của tôi trên tường

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for descriptions
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn để miêu tả vật: 'The dial is white', 'The clock makes a soft tick sound', 'It runs on one small battery'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple to describe an object: 'The dial is white', 'The clock makes a soft tick sound every second'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Verb 'remind' + of
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'remind somebody of something': 'The clock also reminds me of the first day I lived alone.' — nhắc ai đó nhớ về điều gì.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'remind + object + of': 'The clock also reminds me of the first day I lived alone'.

sampleTranslationVi: Trên tường phía trên bàn làm việc trong căn hộ ở Osaka, có một chiếc đồng hồ gỗ hình tròn. Nó không lớn lắm — khoảng ba mươi xen-ti-mét chiều rộng. Mặt đồng hồ màu trắng và các chữ số màu đen. Các kim đồng hồ mỏng và màu nâu đậm. Đồng hồ phát ra tiếng tích tắc nhẹ mỗi giây, nhưng rất êm ái. Tôi nhận được chiếc đồng hồ này như quà tặng từ chú khi chuyển vào căn hộ đầu tiên. Chú mua nó ở một khu chợ nhỏ trong khu phố cổ. Tôi rất thích vẻ đơn giản của nó. Mỗi lần nhìn vào đồng hồ, tôi nghĩ đến chú. Bây giờ chú sống xa, vì vậy tôi ít khi gặp. Chiếc đồng hồ cũng nhắc tôi nhớ ngày đầu tiên sống một mình. Đó là ngày vừa thú vị vừa hơi đáng sợ với tôi. Đồng hồ chạy bằng một viên pin nhỏ và tôi thay pin một lần mỗi năm. Chiếc đồng hồ cũ này chạy đúng giờ. Đây là vật yêu thích của tôi trên tường.

mcQuestions.hint: The shape is in the first description.

mcQuestions.prompt: What colour is the dial of the clock?
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the colour of the face.

mcQuestions.prompt: Who gave the writer this clock?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I got this clock as a gift from my uncle'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the clock remind the writer of?
options: The first day they lived alone.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'The clock also reminds me of the first day I lived alone'.
mcQuestions.hint: An important personal milestone is mentioned.

mcQuestions.prompt: How often does the writer change the battery?
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the frequency of battery changes.

options: This clock reminds me my uncle.
This clock remembers me of my uncle.
This clock reminds me of my uncle.
This clock is remind me of my uncle.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'remind + object + of' is the correct structure.

mcQuestions.prompt: What sound does the clock make?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'The clock makes a soft tick sound every second'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word means the clock shows the correct time?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'keeps good time' is an idiom meaning the clock shows the accurate time.

mcQuestions.prompt: How did the writer feel on the day they first lived alone?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'That was an exciting and a little scary day for me'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where does the writer keep the clock?
options: On the shelf next to books.
On the wall above the desk.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why can ordinary household objects like a clock carry strong personal memories for people?
